PARAM.description: x must be an array of doubles
PARAM.name: x

PARAM.description: y must be an array of doubles
PARAM.name: y

RETURN.description: a function which interpolates the data set
RETURN.content: a function which interpolates the data set

THROWS.description: if x and y have different sizes.
THROWS.name: DimensionMismatchException
THROWS.content: if {@code x} and {@code y} have different sizes.

THROWS.description: if x is not sorted in strict increasing order.
THROWS.name: NonMonotonicSequenceException
THROWS.content: if {@code x} is not sorted in strict increasing order.

THROWS.description: if the size of x is smaller than 2.
THROWS.name: NumberIsTooSmallException
THROWS.content: if the size of {@code x} is smaller than 2.
